texto: I'm interested in exploring the places where all media meet. As TV, Internet, art, games and movies all start moving towards the same point, I want to be part of inventing that space. I'd like to explore media that are traditionally seen as part of the mainstream but not necessarily utilize mainstream formulas.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ryan Trecartin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I'm interested in exploring the places where all media meet. As TV, Internet, art, games and movi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, art, internet pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de internet e moving.

frase_original: I'm interested in exploring the places where all media meet. As TV, Internet, art, games and movies all start moving towards the same point, I want to be part of inventing that space. I'd like to explore media that are traditionally seen as part of the mainstream but not necessarily utilize mainstream formulas.

texto: I think technology is us, not something we invented. I think we are more psychic now because we have cell phones and you can look and see who's calling you. When people start seeing technology as us, as humanity, our whole idea of what existence is, is going to shift.
explicacao: Citação de Ryan Trecartin sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I think technology is us, not something we invented. I think we are more psychic now because we h…” articula reflexao, humanity, start em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como start e people.
